body_transformation: Magikarp's rounded head retains its small crown, now rendered in ethereal silver metal that glows faintly with internal mist, while its pale cream underbelly becomes translucent with swirling violet energy currents visible beneath the surface. The bright orange body transforms into deep violet scales with faint crimson mist swirling within their translucent layers, and the dark brown head accents dissolve into shadowy, wispy textures that blend with the ghostly aura. Its curled tail tip elongates slightly into a wispy, tattered form trailing ghostly white vapour, while the small stubby legs remain but now appear semi-transparent with faint energy ripples distorting the air around them. The entire silhouette maintains its quadrupedal stance and low posture, with all structural elements preserved but now enveloped in a spectral, translucent glow.
signature_feature: Head crown: ethereal silver metal with swirling violet mist energy currents.
